extension:pg_stat_statements.name: pg_stat_statements
extension:pg_stat_statements.comment: track planning and execution statistics of all SQL statements executed

procedure:auth.email().name: email
procedure:auth.email().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth.email()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select 
  coalesce(
    nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claim.email', true), ''),
    (nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true), '')::jsonb ->> 'email')
  )::text
$function$

procedure:auth.jwt().name: jwt
procedure:auth.jwt().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth.jwt()
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select 
    coalesce(
        nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claim', true), ''),
        nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true), '')
    )::jsonb
$function$

procedure:auth.role().name: role
procedure:auth.role().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth.role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select 
  coalesce(
    nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claim.role', true), ''),
    (nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true), '')::jsonb ->> 'role')
  )::text
$function$

procedure:auth.uid().name: uid
procedure:auth.uid().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth.uid()
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select 
  coalesce(
    nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claim.sub', true), ''),
    (nullif(current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true), '')::jsonb ->> 'sub')
  )::uuid
$function$

procedure:extensions.pgrst_ddl_watch().name: pgrst_ddl_watch
procedure:extensions.pgrst_ddl_watch().source_code:
DECLARE
  cmd record;
BEGIN
  FOR cmd IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands()
  LOOP
    IF cmd.command_tag IN (
      'CREATE SCHEMA', 'ALTER SCHEMA'
    , 'CREATE TABLE', 'CREATE TABLE AS', 'SELECT INTO', 'ALTER TABLE'
    , 'CREATE FOREIGN TABLE', 'ALTER FOREIGN TABLE'
    , 'CREATE VIEW', 'ALTER VIEW'
    , 'CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW', 'ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW'
    , 'CREATE FUNCTION', 'ALTER FUNCTION'
    , 'CREATE TRIGGER'
    , 'CREATE TYPE', 'ALTER TYPE'
    , 'CREATE RULE'
    , 'COMMENT'
    )
    -- don't notify in case of CREATE TEMP table or other objects created on pg_temp
    AND cmd.schema_name is distinct from 'pg_temp'
    THEN
      NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
    END IF;
  END LOOP;
END;
procedure:extensions.pgrst_ddl_watch().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.pgrst_ddl_watch()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  cmd record;
BEGIN
  FOR cmd IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands()
  LOOP
    IF cmd.command_tag IN (
      'CREATE SCHEMA', 'ALTER SCHEMA'
    , 'CREATE TABLE', 'CREATE TABLE AS', 'SELECT INTO', 'ALTER TABLE'
    , 'CREATE FOREIGN TABLE', 'ALTER FOREIGN TABLE'
    , 'CREATE VIEW', 'ALTER VIEW'
    , 'CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW', 'ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW'
    , 'CREATE FUNCTION', 'ALTER FUNCTION'
    , 'CREATE TRIGGER'
    , 'CREATE TYPE', 'ALTER TYPE'
    , 'CREATE RULE'
    , 'COMMENT'
    )
    -- don't notify in case of CREATE TEMP table or other objects created on pg_temp
    AND cmd.schema_name is distinct from 'pg_temp'
    THEN
      NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
    END IF;
  END LOOP;
END; $function$

procedure:extensions.pgrst_drop_watch().name: pgrst_drop_watch
procedure:extensions.pgrst_drop_watch().source_code:
DECLARE
  obj record;
BEGIN
  FOR obj IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_dropped_objects()
  LOOP
    IF obj.object_type IN (
      'schema'
    , 'table'
    , 'foreign table'
    , 'view'
    , 'materialized view'
    , 'function'
    , 'trigger'
    , 'type'
    , 'rule'
    )
    AND obj.is_temporary IS false -- no pg_temp objects
    THEN
      NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
    END IF;
  END LOOP;
END;
procedure:extensions.pgrst_drop_watch().definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.pgrst_drop_watch()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  obj record;
BEGIN
  FOR obj IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_dropped_objects()
  LOOP
    IF obj.object_type IN (
      'schema'
    , 'table'
    , 'foreign table'
    , 'view'
    , 'materialized view'
    , 'function'
    , 'trigger'
    , 'type'
    , 'rule'
    )
    AND obj.is_temporary IS false -- no pg_temp objects
    THEN
      NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema';
    END IF;
  END LOOP;
END; $function$

procedure:pgbouncer.get_auth(text).name: get_auth
procedure:pgbouncer.get_auth(text).source_code:
begin
    raise debug 'PgBouncer auth request: %', p_usename;

    return query
    select 
        rolname::text, 
        case when rolvaliduntil < now() 
            then null 
            else rolpassword::text 
        end 
    from pg_authid 
    where rolname=$1 and rolcanlogin;
end;
procedure:pgbouncer.get_auth(text).definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION pgbouncer.get_auth(p_usename text)
 RETURNS TABLE(username text, password text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO ''
AS $function$
begin
    raise debug 'PgBouncer auth request: %', p_usename;

    return query
    select 
        rolname::text, 
        case when rolvaliduntil < now() 
            then null 
            else rolpassword::text 
        end 
    from pg_authid 
    where rolname=$1 and rolcanlogin;
end;
$function$

index:auth.users.users_is_anonymous_idx.name: users_is_anonymous_idx
index:auth.users.users_is_anonymous_idx.definition: CREATE INDEX users_is_anonymous_idx ON auth.users USING btree (is_anonymous)

index:auth.users.reauthentication_token_.name: reauthentication_token_idx
index:auth.users.reauthentication_token_.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX reauthentication_token_idx ON auth.users USING btree (reauthentication_token) WHERE reauthentication_token::text !~ '^[0-9 ]*$'::text

index:auth.users.confirmation_token_idx.name: confirmation_token_idx
index:auth.users.confirmation_token_idx.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX confirmation_token_idx ON auth.users USING btree (confirmation_token) WHERE confirmation_token::text !~ '^[0-9 ]*$'::text

index:auth.users.email_change_token_new_.name: email_change_token_new_idx
index:auth.users.email_change_token_new_.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX email_change_token_new_idx ON auth.users USING btree (email_change_token_new) WHERE email_change_token_new::text !~ '^[0-9 ]*$'::text

index:auth.users.users_instance_id_email.name: users_instance_id_email_idx
index:auth.users.users_instance_id_email.definition: CREATE INDEX users_instance_id_email_idx ON auth.users USING btree (instance_id, lower(email::text))

index:auth.users.recovery_token_idx.name: recovery_token_idx
index:auth.users.recovery_token_idx.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX recovery_token_idx ON auth.users USING btree (recovery_token) WHERE recovery_token::text !~ '^[0-9 ]*$'::text

index:auth.users.email_change_token_curr.name: email_change_token_current_idx
index:auth.users.email_change_token_curr.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX email_change_token_current_idx ON auth.users USING btree (email_change_token_current) WHERE email_change_token_current::text !~ '^[0-9 ]*$'::text

index:auth.users.users_instance_id_idx.name: users_instance_id_idx
index:auth.users.users_instance_id_idx.definition: CREATE INDEX users_instance_id_idx ON auth.users USING btree (instance_id)

index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.name: webauthn_challenges_user_id_idx
index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.definition: CREATE INDEX webauthn_challenges_user_id_idx ON auth.webauthn_challenges USING btree (user_id)

index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.name: webauthn_challenges_pkey
index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX webauthn_challenges_pkey ON auth.webauthn_challenges USING btree (id)

index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.name: webauthn_challenges_expires_at_idx
index:auth.webauthn_challenges.webauthn_.definition: CREATE INDEX webauthn_challenges_expires_at_idx ON auth.webauthn_challenges USING btree (expires_at)

index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.name: webauthn_credentials_credential_id_key
index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX webauthn_credentials_credential_id_key ON auth.webauthn_credentials USING btree (credential_id)

index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.name: webauthn_credentials_user_id_idx
index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.definition: CREATE INDEX webauthn_credentials_user_id_idx ON auth.webauthn_credentials USING btree (user_id)

index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.name: webauthn_credentials_pkey
index:auth.webauthn_credentials.webauthn.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX webauthn_credentials_pkey ON auth.webauthn_credentials USING btree (id)

index:public.goals.idx_goals_target_date.name: idx_goals_target_date
index:public.goals.idx_goals_target_date.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_goals_target_date ON public.goals USING btree (user_id, completed, target_date)

index:public.goals.goals_pkey.name: goals_pkey
index:public.goals.goals_pkey.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX goals_pkey ON public.goals USING btree (id)

index:public.goals.idx_goals_recurrence_.name: idx_goals_recurrence_parent
index:public.goals.idx_goals_recurrence_.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_goals_recurrence_parent ON public.goals USING btree (recurrence_parent_id) WHERE recurrence_parent_id IS NOT NULL

index:supabase_functions.hooks.hooks_pke.name: hooks_pkey
index:supabase_functions.hooks.hooks_pke.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX hooks_pkey ON supabase_functions.hooks USING btree (id)

index:supabase_functions.hooks.supabase_.name: supabase_functions_hooks_h_table_id_h_name_idx
index:supabase_functions.hooks.supabase_.definition: CREATE INDEX supabase_functions_hooks_h_table_id_h_name_idx ON supabase_functions.hooks USING btree (hook_table_id, hook_name)

index:supabase_functions.hooks.supabase_.name: supabase_functions_hooks_request_id_idx
index:supabase_functions.hooks.supabase_.definition: CREATE INDEX supabase_functions_hooks_request_id_idx ON supabase_functions.hooks USING btree (request_id)

index:supabase_functions.migrations.migr.name: migrations_pkey
index:supabase_functions.migrations.migr.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX migrations_pkey ON supabase_functions.migrations USING btree (version)

index:supabase_migrations.schema_migrati.name: schema_migrations_pkey
index:supabase_migrations.schema_migrati.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX schema_migrations_pkey ON supabase_migrations.schema_migrations USING btree (version)

table:auth.audit_log_entries.name: audit_log_entries
table:auth.audit_log_entries.comment: Auth: Audit trail for user actions.

constraints.name: custom_oauth_providers_issuer_length
constraints.definition: CHECK (issuer IS NULL OR char_length(issuer) >= 1 AND char_length(issuer) <= 2048)

constraints.name: custom_oauth_providers_oauth2_requires_endpoints
constraints.check_expression: ((provider_type <> 'oauth2'::text) OR ((authorization_url IS NOT NULL) AND (token_url IS NOT NULL) AND (userinfo_url IS NOT NULL)))
constraints.definition: CHECK (provider_type <> 'oauth2'::text OR authorization_url IS NOT NULL AND token_url IS NOT NULL AND userinfo_url IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: custom_oauth_providers_oidc_discovery_url_https
constraints.definition: CHECK (provider_type <> 'oidc'::text OR discovery_url IS NULL OR discovery_url ~~ 'https://%'::text)

constraints.name: custom_oauth_providers_oidc_issuer_https
constraints.definition: CHECK (provider_type <> 'oidc'::text OR issuer IS NULL OR issuer ~~ 'https://%'::text)

constraints.name: custom_oauth_providers_oidc_requires_issuer
constraints.definition: CHECK (provider_type <> 'oidc'::text OR issuer IS NOT NULL)

table:auth.flow_state.name: flow_state
table:auth.flow_state.comment: Stores metadata for all OAuth/SSO login flows

table:auth.identities.name: identities
table:auth.identities.comment: Auth: Stores identities associated to a user.

columns.name: email
columns.comment: Auth: Email is a generated column that references the optional email property in the identity_data

constraints.name: identities_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.instances.name: instances
table:auth.instances.comment: Auth: Manages users across multiple sites.

table:auth.mfa_amr_claims.name: mfa_amr_claims
table:auth.mfa_amr_claims.comment: auth: stores authenticator method reference claims for multi factor authentication

constraints.name: mfa_amr_claims_session_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES auth.sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.mfa_challenges.name: mfa_challenges
table:auth.mfa_challenges.comment: auth: stores metadata about challenge requests made

constraints.name: mfa_challenges_auth_factor_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (factor_id) REFERENCES auth.mfa_factors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: last_webauthn_challenge_data
columns.comment: Stores the latest WebAuthn challenge data including attestation/assertion for customer verification

constraints.name: mfa_factors_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: oauth_authorizations_client_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES auth.oauth_clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: oauth_authorizations_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.oauth_client_states.name: oauth_client_states
table:auth.oauth_client_states.comment: Stores OAuth states for third-party provider authentication flows where Supabase acts as the OAuth client.

constraints.name: oauth_consents_client_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES auth.oauth_clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: oauth_consents_revoked_after_granted
constraints.definition: CHECK (revoked_at IS NULL OR revoked_at >= granted_at)

constraints.name: oauth_consents_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: one_time_tokens_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.refresh_tokens.name: refresh_tokens
table:auth.refresh_tokens.comment: Auth: Store of tokens used to refresh JWT tokens once they expire.

constraints.name: refresh_tokens_session_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES auth.sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.saml_providers.name: saml_providers
table:auth.saml_providers.comment: Auth: Manages SAML Identity Provider connections.

constraints.name: saml_providers_sso_provider_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (sso_provider_id) REFERENCES auth.sso_providers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.saml_relay_states.name: saml_relay_states
table:auth.saml_relay_states.comment: Auth: Contains SAML Relay State information for each Service Provider initiated login.

constraints.name: saml_relay_states_flow_state_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (flow_state_id) REFERENCES auth.flow_state(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: saml_relay_states_sso_provider_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (sso_provider_id) REFERENCES auth.sso_providers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.schema_migrations.name: schema_migrations
table:auth.schema_migrations.comment: Auth: Manages updates to the auth system.

table:auth.sessions.name: sessions
table:auth.sessions.comment: Auth: Stores session data associated to a user.

columns.name: not_after
columns.comment: Auth: Not after is a nullable column that contains a timestamp after which the session should be regarded as expired.

columns.name: refresh_token_hmac_key
columns.comment: Holds a HMAC-SHA256 key used to sign refresh tokens for this session.

columns.name: refresh_token_counter
columns.comment: Holds the ID (counter) of the last issued refresh token.

constraints.name: sessions_oauth_client_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (oauth_client_id) REFERENCES auth.oauth_clients(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: sessions_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.sso_domains.name: sso_domains
table:auth.sso_domains.comment: Auth: Manages SSO email address domain mapping to an SSO Identity Provider.

constraints.name: sso_domains_sso_provider_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (sso_provider_id) REFERENCES auth.sso_providers(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

table:auth.sso_providers.name: sso_providers
table:auth.sso_providers.comment: Auth: Manages SSO identity provider information; see saml_providers for SAML.

columns.name: resource_id
columns.comment: Auth: Uniquely identifies a SSO provider according to a user-chosen resource ID (case insensitive), useful in infrastructure as code.

table:auth.users.name: users
table:auth.users.comment: Auth: Stores user login data within a secure schema.

columns.name: is_sso_user
columns.comment: Auth: Set this column to true when the account comes from SSO. These accounts can have duplicate emails.

constraints.name: webauthn_challenges_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: webauthn_credentials_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: goals_recurrence_parent_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (recurrence_parent_id) REFERENCES public.goals(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

table:supabase_functions.hooks.name: hooks
table:supabase_functions.hooks.comment: Supabase Functions Hooks: Audit trail for triggered hooks.

rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can delete their own goals"

rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can insert their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can insert their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can insert their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can read their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can read their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can read their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can read their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can update their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can update their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can update their own goals"
rlsPolicy:public.goals."Users can update their own goals"
